questions.question: What keyboard shortcut converts a selected range into an Excel Table?
questions.explanation: Ctrl + T opens the Create Table dialog — giving you auto-expanding ranges, structured references, filter buttons and banded rows.

questions.question: A customer is stored as " Carrefour " with stray spaces. Which function fixes it?
questions.explanation: TRIM removes leading/trailing spaces and collapses internal doubles. CLEAN is for non-printing characters.

questions.question: An export has invisible line breaks and tabs inside cells. Which function strips those out?
questions.explanation: CLEAN removes non-printable characters. A common combo is =TRIM(CLEAN(A2)).

questions.question: The SalesValue column won't SUM and the values are left-aligned with a green triangle. What fixes it?
options: They're stored as text — use VALUE() or Convert to Number
questions.explanation: Left-aligned numbers with a warning triangle are text. VALUE() converts them to real numbers so they add up.

questions.question: A Date like "2024-03-15" is left-aligned and can't be grouped by month. Which function converts it?
questions.explanation: DATEVALUE turns a text date into a real Excel date — needed to group by month/quarter later.

questions.question: An OrderNumber is "SO-100562". Which formula pulls out just the number part, "100562"?
questions.explanation: MID(text, start, length) extracts from the middle — 6 characters from position 4. LEFT(A2,2) would give "SO".
